fa-floppy-disk-pen.appearanceId: square floppy disk outline with a sliding metal shutter at the bottom and a small pen or pencil overlaid in the lower right corner; storage disk shape with a writing instrument badge
fa-floppy-disk-pen.functionalityId: saves an in-progress edit or draft directly to disk; writes and stores modified content in a file
fa-floppy-disk-pen.intentId: save edits or annotated changes to a file; persist a drafted or annotated document

fa-floppy-disks.appearanceId: two overlapping square floppy disk outlines stacked or side by side, each with a shutter slot; a pair of storage disk silhouettes arranged as a duplicate set
fa-floppy-disks.functionalityId: saves multiple files or creates a duplicate backup copy; manages multiple storage media or disk slots
fa-floppy-disks.intentId: back up data across multiple disks; save copies of files to more than one storage location

fa-florin-sign.appearanceId: stylized lowercase f with two horizontal crossbars through the stem; a currency glyph resembling a script f with dual parallel strikethrough lines
fa-florin-sign.functionalityId: displays or selects the florin or guilder currency symbol; represents a historical Dutch or Hungarian monetary denomination
fa-florin-sign.intentId: indicate a price in florin or guilder currency; access historical European currency data in a financial app

fa-flower.appearanceId: circular bloom with multiple rounded petals radiating symmetrically around a central round disc; generic five or six petal flower silhouette with a solid center
fa-flower.functionalityId: marks a floral, botanical, or nature category in an app; decorates content with a flower motif
fa-flower.intentId: indicate a floral or garden-related theme; access botanical or nature content

fa-flower-daffodil.appearanceId: daffodil bloom with six pointed petals radiating outward and a protruding central trumpet or corona cup in the middle; star-shaped petal ring surrounding a raised cylindrical center tube
fa-flower-daffodil.functionalityId: marks a spring flower or daffodil category in a botanical or garden app; represents a trumpet-flowered plant species
fa-flower-daffodil.intentId: indicate a spring or daffodil floral theme; access botanical content related to trumpet-shaped flowers

fa-flower-tulip.appearanceId: tulip bloom with three rounded outer petals forming a cup or goblet shape on a straight stem with two leaf blades; closed-cup petal silhouette on an upright stalk with lateral leaves
fa-flower-tulip.functionalityId: marks a tulip or spring flower category in a botanical or garden app; represents a cup-shaped bloom in a floral catalog
fa-flower-tulip.intentId: indicate a tulip or spring floral theme; access bulb-flower content in a botanical or garden app

fa-flushed.appearanceId: circular face outline with wide circular eyes, rosy or shaded cheeks on both sides of the face, and a small neutral mouth; round emoticon with large dot eyes and visible blush marks on the cheeks
fa-flushed.functionalityId: expresses embarrassment, surprise, or flushed emotion in a message; inserts a blushing or red-faced emoji reaction
fa-flushed.intentId: convey embarrassment or flustered emotion in a chat; react with a blushing or surprised face expression

fa-flute.appearanceId: long thin horizontal cylinder or tube with a series of small circular tone holes along its length and a blow hole near one end; slender woodwind pipe silhouette with evenly spaced finger holes
fa-flute.functionalityId: selects or plays a flute instrument in a music or orchestra app; marks a woodwind or orchestral instrument category
fa-flute.intentId: play or compose with a flute instrument; access woodwind or orchestral instrument settings

fa-flux-capacitor.appearanceId: Y-shaped or three-pronged fork outline with glowing or spark-like marks at each tip and a central hub; trident or branching connector shape with radiating energy marks at each branch end
fa-flux-capacitor.functionalityId: represents a time-travel or science-fiction power source element; marks a retro-futuristic or novelty feature in a themed app
fa-flux-capacitor.intentId: access a time-travel or retro sci-fi themed feature; indicate a fictional power or energy concept in an entertainment app

fa-flying-disc.appearanceId: flat circular disc shape with a slightly domed top and a narrow rim or lip around the edge; shallow saucer silhouette with a curved upper surface and a defined outer edge ring
fa-flying-disc.functionalityId: marks a frisbee or disc sport activity in a recreation or sports app; represents an outdoor throwing game or toy
fa-flying-disc.intentId: find disc golf, frisbee, or outdoor throwing game content; access flying disc sports or recreation categories

fa-fog.appearanceId: several horizontal wavy or straight parallel lines of decreasing length stacked to suggest haze; layered horizontal stroke bands representing obscured visibility or mist
fa-fog.functionalityId: displays a fog or low-visibility weather condition in a forecast app; indicates misty or hazy atmospheric conditions
fa-fog.intentId: check fog or haze weather conditions; indicate low-visibility weather in a forecast or map view

fa-folder.appearanceId: folder shape with a flat bottom, two vertical sides, and a top edge with a small rectangular tab on the left; standard file folder silhouette with a protruding label tab at the upper-left corner
fa-folder.functionalityId: opens or navigates to a directory or file container; represents a folder in a file system browser
fa-folder.intentId: organize or access files stored in a folder; navigate to a directory in a file manager

fa-folder-bookmark.appearanceId: folder silhouette with a small ribbon bookmark or pennant shape overlaid at the lower right corner; standard folder tab outline with a pointed-bottom bookmark badge
fa-folder-bookmark.functionalityId: saves a folder as a favorite or bookmarked location; marks a directory as a pinned or starred destination
fa-folder-bookmark.intentId: bookmark a folder for quick access; mark a directory as a favorite in a file manager

fa-folder-check.appearanceId: folder silhouette with a checkmark overlaid in the lower right area; standard folder tab outline with a tick mark badge indicating completion
fa-folder-check.functionalityId: marks a folder as reviewed, complete, or approved; confirms that a directory has been processed or verified
fa-folder-check.intentId: indicate that a folder's contents have been reviewed or completed; mark a directory as verified or done

fa-folder-closed.appearanceId: closed folder shape with a flat bottom, vertical sides, a tab on top, and a visible front face panel suggesting it is shut; folder silhouette with a prominent front face indicating a sealed or closed state
fa-folder-closed.functionalityId: indicates a directory that is currently closed or not expanded; collapses an open folder back to its closed state
fa-folder-closed.intentId: close or collapse a folder in a file tree; indicate an unexpanded or sealed directory

fa-folder-cog.appearanceId: folder silhouette with a gear or cog wheel overlaid in the lower right corner; standard folder tab outline with a settings gear badge
fa-folder-cog.functionalityId: opens folder settings or configuration options; manages directory properties or permissions
fa-folder-cog.intentId: configure a folder's settings or permissions; access directory management options

fa-folder-download.appearanceId: folder silhouette with a downward-pointing arrow overlaid inside or at the bottom center; folder tab outline with a download arrow badge pointing downward
fa-folder-download.functionalityId: downloads all contents of a folder to a local device; initiates a bulk download from a directory
fa-folder-download.intentId: download an entire folder or its contents; save a remote directory locally

fa-folder-grid.appearanceId: folder silhouette with a small grid of dots or squares overlaid on the front face; standard folder tab outline with a four-dot or two-by-two grid pattern badge
fa-folder-grid.functionalityId: switches a folder view to a grid or thumbnail layout; displays directory contents as a grid of items
fa-folder-grid.intentId: view folder contents in a grid layout; toggle a directory to tile or thumbnail display mode

fa-folder-heart.appearanceId: folder silhouette with a heart shape overlaid in the center or lower right area; standard folder tab outline with a heart badge indicating affection or favoriting
fa-folder-heart.functionalityId: marks a folder as loved or favorited with a heart; saves a directory to a favorites or loved collection
fa-folder-heart.intentId: favorite or like a folder for personal use; mark a directory as a loved or special collection

fa-folder-image.appearanceId: folder silhouette with a small landscape image frame or photo thumbnail overlaid on the front face; folder tab outline with a picture or photo badge inside
fa-folder-image.functionalityId: opens an image or media folder in a gallery or file browser; marks a directory as containing photos or visual assets
fa-folder-image.intentId: browse a folder of images or photos; access a media or picture directory

fa-folder-medical.appearanceId: folder silhouette with a medical cross or plus symbol overlaid in the center; standard folder tab outline with a healthcare cross badge
fa-folder-medical.functionalityId: opens a medical records folder or health documents directory; marks a folder as containing healthcare or clinical files
fa-folder-medical.intentId: access medical records or health-related documents in a folder; organize clinical files in a healthcare directory

fa-folder-minus.appearanceId: folder silhouette with a horizontal minus bar overlaid in the center or lower area; standard folder tab outline with a subtraction dash badge
fa-folder-minus.functionalityId: removes a folder from a list or collapses a directory branch; deletes or unsubscribes from a folder
fa-folder-minus.intentId: remove or unsubscribe from a folder; delete a directory from a file system

fa-folder-music.appearanceId: folder silhouette with a musical note overlaid on the front face; standard folder tab outline with a single or double music note badge
fa-folder-music.functionalityId: opens a music or audio files folder; marks a directory as containing audio tracks or music assets
fa-folder-music.intentId: browse a folder of music or audio files; access a music library directory

fa-folder-open.appearanceId: open folder shape with a tab on top, vertical sides, and a raised or lifted front flap revealing the interior; folder silhouette with the front panel angled upward showing an open cavity
fa-folder-open.functionalityId: opens or expands a folder to display its contents; navigates into a directory in a file browser
fa-folder-open.intentId: view the contents of a folder; expand a directory to see its files

fa-folder-plus.appearanceId: folder silhouette with a plus or cross symbol overlaid in the center; standard folder tab outline with an addition sign badge
fa-folder-plus.functionalityId: creates a new folder or adds a directory to the file system; adds files or items to an existing folder
fa-folder-plus.intentId: create a new directory or folder; add a new folder to a file manager

fa-folder-search.appearanceId: folder silhouette with a magnifying glass overlaid in the lower right corner; standard folder tab outline with a search lens badge
fa-folder-search.functionalityId: searches within a folder's contents or across directories; opens a file search tool scoped to a specific folder
fa-folder-search.intentId: find files inside a folder or directory; search for content within a specific directory

fa-folder-times.appearanceId: folder silhouette with an X mark overlaid in the center or lower right area; standard folder tab outline with a close or delete cross badge
fa-folder-times.functionalityId: deletes or removes a folder from the file system; cancels or dismisses a selected directory
fa-folder-times.intentId: delete or close a folder; remove a directory from a file manager

fa-folder-tree.appearanceId: folder silhouette with a branching tree or hierarchical node diagram overlaid on the front; folder tab outline with a file-tree branch structure badge showing parent and child nodes
fa-folder-tree.functionalityId: displays or navigates a hierarchical folder tree structure; expands a directory tree showing nested subdirectories
fa-folder-tree.intentId: explore a hierarchical file or folder tree; navigate nested directory structures

fa-folder-upload.appearanceId: folder silhouette with an upward-pointing arrow overlaid inside or at the top center; folder tab outline with an upload arrow badge pointing upward
fa-folder-upload.functionalityId: uploads files from a local folder to a remote server or cloud; initiates a bulk upload from a selected directory
fa-folder-upload.intentId: upload a folder or its contents to a cloud or server; transfer local directory files to remote storage

fa-folder-user.appearanceId: folder silhouette with a person or user silhouette overlaid in the center; standard folder tab outline with a human figure badge
fa-folder-user.functionalityId: opens a user's personal folder or profile directory; marks a folder as belonging to a specific user
fa-folder-user.intentId: access a user's personal file directory; view or manage files associated with a specific user account

fa-folders.appearanceId: two or more folder shapes stacked or overlapping with tab outlines visible; a set of folder silhouettes grouped together suggesting multiple directories
fa-folders.functionalityId: navigates to a collection of folders or a multi-directory view; manages multiple directories or folder groups at once
fa-folders.intentId: browse multiple folders or directories at once; manage a collection of file folders

fa-fondue-pot.appearanceId: round pot or cauldron shape on a stand with a small burner or flame beneath and dipping forks leaning against it; circular cooking vessel silhouette on legs with a heat source and utensil accents
fa-fondue-pot.functionalityId: marks a fondue dish or Swiss cuisine category in a food or restaurant app; represents a communal hot-pot cooking activity
fa-fondue-pot.intentId: find fondue recipes or Swiss cuisine options; access communal cooking or hot-pot dining content

fa-font.appearanceId: large capital letter A with serifs and smaller lowercase letters or a second A nearby forming a typographic glyph pair; single or paired letterform glyphs representing a typeface
fa-font.functionalityId: opens a font selector or typeface settings panel; changes the font family of selected text
fa-font.intentId: choose or change a text font or typeface; access typography settings for a document or design

fa-font-case.appearanceId: large uppercase letter A paired with a small lowercase letter a side by side; a capital and lowercase letter glyph duo representing case toggling
fa-font-case.functionalityId: toggles text between uppercase, lowercase, or title case; changes the letter case of selected text in an editor
fa-font-case.intentId: change the capitalization or case of text; toggle between uppercase and lowercase in a text editor

fa-football.appearanceId: oval or prolate spheroid shape with curved lacing stitches along the center seam; elongated elliptical ball silhouette with stitch marks on its surface
fa-football.functionalityId: marks an American football sport category or game event; represents football-related content in a sports app
fa-football.intentId: access American football scores, games, or content; browse football-related sports information

fa-football-helmet.appearanceId: domed helmet shape with a face guard or cage grille in front and a chin strap outline; protective sports headgear silhouette with a bar-grid visor attached to the front
fa-football-helmet.functionalityId: marks a football player or team gear category; represents protective sports equipment in a sporting goods or team management app
fa-football-helmet.intentId: access football gear, team equipment, or player safety content; browse American football helmet or protective gear options

fa-fork.appearanceId: long-handled utensil with four upward-pointing tines at the top; dining fork silhouette with a straight handle and a multi-prong head
fa-fork.functionalityId: marks a dining, restaurant, or meal category in a food app; represents eating utensils in a kitchen or menu context
fa-fork.intentId: find dining or restaurant options; indicate a meal or eating context in a food app

fa-fork-knife.appearanceId: a fork with tines on the left and a knife with a blade on the right placed side by side; paired dining utensil silhouettes with a fork and knife facing upward
fa-fork-knife.functionalityId: opens a restaurant, meal, or dining category in a food app; marks a location as a place to eat
fa-fork-knife.intentId: find a restaurant or dining option; indicate a meal or food service context

fa-forklift.appearanceId: industrial vehicle silhouette with two horizontal fork tines protruding from the front, a vertical mast, and a cab body with wheels; warehouse lift truck outline with front lifting forks and a driver cab
fa-forklift.functionalityId: marks a warehouse, logistics, or heavy-lift equipment category; represents material handling or pallet-moving operations
fa-forklift.intentId: manage warehouse equipment or logistics operations; access forklift or material handling content in an industrial app

fa-fort.appearanceId: rectangular or square fortress outline with battlements or crenellations along the top wall and a gate or door opening at the bottom; castle wall silhouette with notched parapets and an arched entrance
fa-fort.functionalityId: marks a historical site, fort, or castle location on a map; represents a defensive structure in a game or history app
fa-fort.intentId: explore a fort or castle location or historical site; access fortification-themed content in a game or history app

fa-forward.appearanceId: two right-pointing solid triangles or arrowheads side by side forming a fast-forward double chevron; a pair of filled play triangles pointing to the right
fa-forward.functionalityId: skips forward in media playback or advances to the next track; fast-forwards through audio or video content
fa-forward.intentId: skip ahead or fast-forward in media playback; advance to the next item in a playlist

fa-forward-step.appearanceId: a single right-pointing filled triangle followed by a vertical bar on the right side; one play arrowhead with a stop bar at its right edge indicating a single-step advance
fa-forward-step.functionalityId: advances playback to the next track or step in a queue; skips to the immediately following media item
fa-forward-step.intentId: go to the next track or step in a media playlist; advance one item forward in a queue

fa-fragile.appearanceId: wine glass or goblet silhouette with crack marks or fracture lines on it, sometimes inside a square or diamond border; breakable glassware outline with shatter marks indicating delicate contents
fa-fragile.functionalityId: marks a package or item as fragile or breakable; indicates that contents require careful handling during shipping
fa-fragile.intentId: label a shipment as fragile or handle-with-care; indicate that an item is breakable and requires gentle handling

fa-frame.appearanceId: rectangular border outline with corner marks or a simple box frame with no interior content; thin-lined square or portrait rectangle resembling an empty picture frame
fa-frame.functionalityId: adds a frame or border around an image or content area; selects or defines a frame boundary in a design tool
fa-frame.intentId: frame or border an image or design element; define a framed container in a layout or design tool

fa-franc-sign.appearanceId: capital letter F with two horizontal crossbars through the upper stem portion; a currency glyph resembling an uppercase F with dual parallel strikethrough lines
fa-franc-sign.functionalityId: displays or selects the Swiss franc or French franc currency symbol; represents a franc-denominated monetary value in a financial app
fa-franc-sign.intentId: indicate a price or value in Swiss or French francs; access franc currency data in a financial or banking app

fa-french-fries.appearanceId: rectangular carton or cup container with several elongated stick shapes sticking up from the top; takeout fry box silhouette with vertical rectangular strips representing fried potatoes
fa-french-fries.functionalityId: marks a fast food or fried side dish option in a food or restaurant menu; represents a fries or snack category
fa-french-fries.intentId: find french fries or fast food side dish options; browse snack or fast food items in a restaurant app

fa-frog.appearanceId: compact frog body silhouette with two large hind legs splayed outward, small front legs, and a wide rounded head with protruding eyes; amphibian outline with long rear legs and bulging eye bumps on top
fa-frog.functionalityId: marks an amphibian, nature, or wildlife category in an app; represents a frog or pond life element in a nature or educational context
fa-frog.intentId: access wildlife or amphibian content; indicate a pond, nature, or frog-themed element in an app

fa-frosty-head.appearanceId: snowman or round head shape with a carrot nose, dot eyes, and a winter hat or snow-covered top; circular face silhouette with facial feature dots and a pointed nose suggesting a frosty snowman
fa-frosty-head.functionalityId: marks a winter, snowman, or holiday themed element in an app; represents a frosty or cold-weather character
fa-frosty-head.intentId: indicate a winter holiday or snowman-themed feature; access cold-weather or festive seasonal content
